title: Domain 4: Guidelines for Responsible AI (14%)
description: The principles of responsible AI, fairness, bias, transparency, explainability, and the AWS tools that help you uphold them.

lessons.title: Principles of Responsible AI
objectives: Name the core dimensions of responsible AI
Distinguish bias, fairness, transparency, and explainability
Recognise responsible-AI risks in a scenario

lessons.title: Responsible AI Tools on AWS
objectives: Match AWS tools to responsible-AI goals (SageMaker Clarify, Model Monitor, Bedrock Guardrails)
Explain AI Service Cards and human review with Amazon A2I
Choose the right tool to detect bias or filter unsafe output
